headline: PayPal Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL) Emerges as a Compelling Value Investment Opportunity
summary: PayPal (PYPL) presents a classic value investing case, trading at very low P/E and cash flow multiples while maintaining strong profitability and financial health.
